scripts.clean: node --eval "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');function walk(d){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const p=path.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()){if(f==='node_modules'){console.log('Removing',p);fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Removed',p)}else{walk(p)}}}}console.log('Scanning...');walk('.');console.log('Clean done')"
scripts.clean:no-out: node --eval "const fs=require('node:fs');function walk(d){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const p=require('node:path').join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()){if(f==='node_modules'){fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})}else{walk(p)}}}}walk('.')"
